trigger_keywords: suavizar la textura en un vino tinto

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A structured red wine contains abundant tannins when it is bottled.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Over time tannin and pigment molecules polymerise into larger structures; some eventually precipitate as sediment.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The concentration of freely astringent tannins falls and the wine's texture becomes softer and more integrated.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The concentration of freely astringent tannins falls and the wine's texture becomes softer and more integrated.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
